enrichments.summary: Perform prescribed action; action is better than inaction — even bodily maintenance needs action.
enrichments.modern_interpretation: Withdrawal that abandons responsibility is not spirituality; sincere work can be yoga.
practice: Choose one neglected duty and complete it today without drama.
enrichments.reflection_question: Where am I calling avoidance 'spiritual'?

enrichments.summary: Therefore, without attachment, always perform necessary action — by acting without attachment one attains the Supreme.
enrichments.modern_interpretation: Keep doing what must be done; freedom grows inside action when clinging drops away.
practice: Do today's necessary task fully, then consciously release the result.
enrichments.reflection_question: Which necessary action am I delaying because I am attached to how it must turn out?
enrichments.uncertainty_notes: High-priority verse override — still requires human review before approval.

enrichments.summary: Surrendering all actions to Me, with mind on the Self, free of desire and possessiveness — fight without fever.

practice: Before work, silently offer it beyond ego; then begin.
